Rule "logs" in detector "logs" cleared at Thu, 29 Feb 2024 11:48:32 GMT.

Current signal value for sf.org.log.numMessagesDroppedThrottle: 0

Signal details:
{sf_metric=sf.org.log.numMessagesDroppedThrottle, orgId=XXXX}
